title: Zombie Horde Event + Anti Skybase Phantoms
description: Small server side fabric mod i made for my server
body:
A custom made mod to introduce a zombie apocalypse kind of event like the bloodmoon plugin. This is a server side only fabric mod.
Every 7 days there is a horde event that spawns zombies everywhere (phantoms too if the player is above y level 100).
The phantoms will explode upon impact.
I haven't tested the day counter or anything like that but i think it should work if you keep sendCommandFeedback on.

do /apocalypse <command> to see the commands and config in general.
